meaning: n.立体派艺术家adj.立体派的
examples: The museum houses several of his Cubist masterpieces.
Sometimes the artist seemed to be a cubist; sometimes not.
By this time it was less easy to discern a single cubist school.
At Cubist Pharmaceuticals outside Boston, Wyeth veteran Francis Tally rescued a novel antibiotic abandoned by Eli Lilly.
John Collomosse has designed software that can transform videos into cartoons, and photographs into cubist portraits.
